meta.title: Functional Safety & Cybersecurity ... Diving into the Details
meta.description:
TUV is one of the leaders by any measure in Function Safety. So it is very interesting to hear how they believe Functional Safety and ICS Security should be approached throughout the system lifecycle in this S4xEurope session.

They go through some examples and process flows to understand what they are doing and believe is the right approach.
